args:
IOS_RUNNER="$HOME/.ios-runner/bin/ios-runner"
if [ ! -x "$IOS_RUNNER" ]; then
  echo "iOS-Runner: 正在下载命令行工具（无需 cargo）…"
  mkdir -p "$HOME/.ios-runner/bin"
  ARCH="$(uname -m)"
  case "$ARCH" in
    arm64) ASSET="ios-runner-aarch64-apple-darwin" ;;
    x86_64) ASSET="ios-runner-x86_64-apple-darwin" ;;
    *) echo "不支持的 Mac 架构: $ARCH"; exit 1 ;;
  esac
  URL="https://github.com/buds520/ios-runner/releases/latest/download/${ASSET}"
  if ! curl -fsSL "$URL" -o "$IOS_RUNNER"; then
    echo "下载失败: $URL"
    echo "请检查网络，或暂时用: cargo install ios-runner --git https://github.com/buds520/ios-runner --locked"
    exit 1
  fi
  chmod +x "$IOS_RUNNER"
  echo "✓ 已安装 $IOS_RUNNER"
fi
export PATH="$HOME/.ios-runner/bin:$PATH"
export IOS_RUNNER_RAW_LOG=1
cd "$ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT" && "$IOS_RUNNER" ensure && "$IOS_RUNNER" run
label: iOS-Runner: Run

label: iOS-Runner: Select Scheme & Device
